pairs.question: What is the title and significance of the series finale of The Flash?
pairs.answer: The series finale of The Flash is titled 'A New World.' It marks the conclusion of both the series and the Arrowverse as a whole, consisting of the tenth to thirteenth episodes of the ninth season.

pairs.question: Who stars as Barry Allen / The Flash in the series finale?
pairs.answer: Barry Allen / The Flash is portrayed by Grant Gustin in the series finale.

pairs.question: What major antagonist does Barry Allen face in 'A New World'?
pairs.answer: Barry Allen confronts Eddie Thawne, who is resurrected and becomes the speedster Cobalt Blue in the series finale.

pairs.question: How many episodes make up the 'A New World' arc, and when did they air?
pairs.answer: The 'A New World' arc consists of four episodes, airing from May 3, 2023, to May 24, 2023.

pairs.question: Which writers contributed to the first and fourth parts of 'A New World'?
pairs.answer: The first and fourth parts of 'A New World' were co-written by Eric Wallace with Thomas Pound and Sam Chalsen, respectively.

pairs.question: What is the role of Barry Allen before becoming The Flash?
pairs.answer: Before gaining superhuman speed, Barry Allen worked as a crime-scene investigator.

pairs.question: How many average viewers did 'A New World' attract per episode?
pairs.answer: The episodes of 'A New World' averaged around 430,000 viewers each.
